title: Bounding Causal Effects with an Unknown Mixture of Informative and Non-Informative Missingness
summary_en: We propose bounds on causal effects for missing outcomes, accommodating the scenario where missingness is an unobserved mixture of informative and non-informative components.
title_cn: [待翻译] Bounding Causal Effects with an Unknown Mixture of Informative and Non-Informative Missingness
